---
title: "Mary Augusta Ward"
---

## Mary Augusta Ward

**Dates:** (1851-1920)

**Maiden name:** (Arnold)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, novelist as ‘Mrs Humphry Ward

### Biography

Daughter of Thomas Arnold (1823-1900) school inspector and teacher, she was the granddaughter of Dr. Arnold of Rugby; she married (1872) Thomas Humphry Ward.  She became a Gosling as ‘Windermere’ in 1869;  she was evidently a friend of Theodora Clarke.

### Letters

- Letter from October 10, 1890.
- Letter from Nov 1st  [1888]
- Letter from Oct 6th 1888
- Letter from Novr 22d 1878
- Letter from Novr 10th 1878
- Letter from [March 1869]
- Letter from March 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Decr 3d [1868]
- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
